text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hey, girls. Can we take a picture<n>together? I want
to send it to my<n>family! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I don't mind. Do you just want<n>a
normal photo of us though?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
We could go somewhere nice and wear<n>fancy
clothes to make the photo more<n>special.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...She's right. I think I'll sit this one out.<n>I'm sure
your family wouldn't want to see<n>a plain
Umamusume like me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: No way, I want it normal! And I want myfamily to see all my precious friends, soyou've got to be in the picture.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but deciding on a pose would be<n>nice! How
do you two normally pose for<n>photos?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes I raise both hands, or bring<n>them to
my face... What about you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I try to stand out as little as possible, so<n>I don't
usually pose.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I see... In that case, let's make up a<n>pose that
only we do together!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, now that sounds like a fun idea!<n>Let's make
up a super cute pose that will<n>stick in people's
memories!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I feel like that would make the photo<n>kind of
special though. Are you okay<n>with it not being
"normal"?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this is different! This kind of<n>special shows
that we're close and<n>having fun together! ♪
